sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92494" key="r(inokope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῑνο-κοπέω</orth>, <sense id="n92494.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut off the nose</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥ. τινά</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
